scoreScale.passRule: An axis earns 5.0 only when every independent evidence command exits 0 in the current run. Missing, stale, skipped, self-referential, synthetic external, or failing evidence leaves the axis UNVERIFIED; weighted total 5.0 requires all six axes at 5.0.

changePolicy.rule: Do not edit axes, weights, baselines, requirements or thresholds in place after freeze. A changed oracle requires a new version, a new digest, explicit human approval and a new goal unit.

requirements.criterion: A frozen adversarial corpus has zero critical false completions, zero high-risk bypasses and detects every seeded completion mutation.
Low and medium risk completion policy stays calibrated: permitted no-signal work is not converted into a hard false block.
Every canonical hard gate produces equivalent allow and deny behaviour through Claude Code and Codex transports.
Host-observed elapsed time and tokens are attributed to session, unit, skill, model and host without presenting estimates as observations.
Frozen paired A/B tasks meet proportionality ceilings for low, medium and high risk while preserving verified quality.
Budget ceilings stop excess work before another expensive attempt and the low-risk path does not pay high-risk checker cost.
A clean external repository completes cold start, adoption and its first verified task without manual path or interpreter repair.
Read-only and already-authorized work has no skill-enforcement dead end, and every denial includes actionable WHY and FIX guidance.
Adoption is idempotent, preserves project-owned files and produces filled executable contracts rather than template prose.
A repeated telemetry or review defect class deterministically becomes an evidence-backed proposal, experiment and explicit keep, change or rollback decision.
Retro FACTS are derived from durable events, regressions, review findings, friction and cost rather than model narration.
Learning promotion remains human-gated and an independent eval-set detects rubric regressions before a methodology change is accepted.
Claude Code and Codex packages expose one vendor-neutral skill, hook and contract core with adapter-only transport differences.
Focused behavioural probes pass through Windows PowerShell, Git Bash and WSL/Linux launch paths without host-specific manual repair.
Portable interpreter rules and documentation/registration drift fail closed in CI.
The opt-in external outcome contract is privacy-safe, validates baseline/follow-up provenance and never treats fixtures or the methodology repository as adoption.
Fresh evidence covers at least the frozen minimum independent projects, operators, comparable units and observation duration with no critical regression.
Independent provenance rejects author-only self-report, duplicate projects/operators, synthetic records and unverifiable source hashes.
